publicSideBand: No public-side cost is published because Madison reports no known utility-owned lead service lines
privateSideBand: Up to $3000 rebate may be available if a property owner discovers lead service on private property
fullReplacementBand: Full replacement cost is mostly owner-managed with rebate support rather than a published citywide price
housingTypeAssumption: Madison publishes rebate support but not current bid ranges
permitAssumption: Owner must confirm lead service on private property and contact Madison Water
restorationAssumption: Contractor and restoration scope vary by private-property conditions
methodologySummary: Madison does not have a citywide utility replacement price because it reports no known utility-owned lead service lines and instead offers a capped rebate only when a property owner discovers lead on private property.
ownerTriggerSummary: Owners stay on an owner-managed path unless private lead is discovered and Madison Water confirms rebate eligibility so this route remains a rebate guide rather than a no-cost program page.
